context: Tests whether the agent can ensure a Rails engine is compatible across multiple Rails versions by updating the gemspec constraint, creating a CI matrix, and documenting known breaking changes — following the rails-engine-compatibility skill.

checklist.name: gemspec Rails constraint updated
checklist.description: The gemspec changes the Rails dependency from '~> 7.1' to a constraint that allows 7.0, 7.1, and 7.2 but not 8.x (e.g. '>= 7.0', '< 8' or '~> 7.0')

checklist.name: CI workflow file created
checklist.description: A .github/workflows/ci.yml file is produced with a GitHub Actions workflow

checklist.name: Matrix covers 3 Ruby-Rails combos
checklist.description: The CI matrix includes at least: Ruby 3.1 + Rails 7.0, Ruby 3.2 + Rails 7.1, Ruby 3.3 + Rails 7.2

checklist.name: Matrix uses env vars or gemfiles
checklist.description: The CI matrix passes Rails version via BUNDLE_GEMFILE, RAILS_VERSION env var, or appraisal gemfiles — not hard-coding rails in the gemspec

checklist.name: At least 2 Rails 7.x breaking changes noted
checklist.description: The compatibility notes identify at least 2 relevant breaking changes or deprecations across Rails 7.0→7.2 (e.g. migration DSL changes, autoloading, zeitwerk updates)

checklist.name: isolate_namespace preserved
checklist.description: The engine.rb file is not modified and still has isolate_namespace ShippingRates

checklist.name: required_ruby_version added to gemspec
checklist.description: The updated gemspec includes spec.required_ruby_version with a minimum Ruby version (>= 3.1 or similar)

checklist.name: CI runs tests step
checklist.description: The CI workflow includes a step that runs the test suite (bundle exec rspec or bundle exec rake)

checklist.name: frozen_string_literal in Ruby files
checklist.description: Any modified .rb files retain # frozen_string_literal: true
